seoTitle: Mullaquana vs Mundallio — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mullaquana and Mundallio. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mullaquana and Mundallio.
heading: Mullaquana vs Mundallio — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mullaquana, South Australia and Mundallio, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mundallio has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mullaquana (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mullaquana or Mundallio safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mullaquana has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Mundallio scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mullaquana scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Mundallio scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mullaquana or Mundallio?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mundallio has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
